segments.text: Then Job answered and said:
No doubt you are the people, And wisdom will die with you!
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: But I have understanding as well as you; I am not inferior to you. Indeed, who does not know such things as these?
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: I am one mocked by his friends, Who called on God, and He answered him, The just and blameless who is ridiculed.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: A lamp is despised in the thought of one who is at ease; It is made ready for those whose feet slip.
The tents of robbers prosper, And those who provoke God are secure— In what God provides by His hand.
But now ask the beasts, and they will teach you; And the birds of the air, and they will tell you;
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: Or speak to the earth, and it will teach you; And the fish of the sea will explain to you.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: Who among all these does not know That the hand of the Lord has done this,
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: In whose hand is the life of every living thing, And the breath of all mankind?
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: Does not the ear test words And the mouth taste its food?
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: Wisdom is with aged men, And with length of days, understanding.
With Him are wisdom and strength, He has counsel and understanding.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: If He breaks a thing down, it cannot be rebuilt; If He imprisons a man, there can be no release.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: If He withholds the waters, they dry up; If He sends them out, they overwhelm the earth.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: With Him are strength and prudence. The deceived and the deceiver are His.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: He leads counselors away plundered, And makes fools of the judges.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: He loosens the bonds of kings, And binds their waist with a belt.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: He leads princes away plundered, And overthrows the mighty.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: He deprives the trusted ones of speech, And takes away the discernment of the elders.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: He pours contempt on princes, And disarms the mighty.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: He uncovers deep things out of darkness, And brings the shadow of death to light.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: He makes nations great, and destroys them; He enlarges nations, and guides them.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: He takes away the understanding of the chiefs of the people of the earth, And makes them wander in a pathless wilderness.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: They grope in the dark without light, And He makes them stagger like a drunken man.
segments.speaker: Job
